repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md: ThmSmith/PartialID empty seed; pid_late_bounded_defiers is one-period CLATE, not dynamic full-history IV

published_prior_art.cite: BalkePearl1997: static binary-IV sharp bounds via latent LP

repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md: promoted Balke-Pearl partial-ID and ExactID/DynamicLATE endpoints, but not this combined sanity reduction
pid_late_bounded_defiers: one-period CLATE envelope; no full-history dynamic non-Markov compression result

published_prior_art.cite: ChenZhang2023 and Han2024 concern IV-optimal regimes/welfare orderings, not strict full-history sharp-bound gain
BalkePearl1997 is static; ChenZhang2023 Bellman partial-ID does not state non-pastability of local BP tables

repo_prior_art.cite: ExactID/DynamicLATE is a stronger-assumption two-period point-ID result, not a T<=2 partial-ID minimality theorem

published_prior_art.cite: SwansonLabrecqueHernan2018 addresses sustained-treatment IV null testing, not minimal horizon for sharp-bound history gain

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The dynamic time-varying IV comparison misses closer published comparators: Michael, Cui, Lorch, and Tchetgen Tchetgen 2024 JASA on MSMMs with time-varying IV, and van den Berg, Bonev, and Mammen 2020 ReStat on nonparametric IV methods for dynamic treatment evaluation.

soundness_flags.label: Formal setup / Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The latent type ell is defined only as compliance and outcome response maps, but L_e uses h_0(ell); H_0 must be included in the latent type or modeled by a separate baseline-type distribution.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Patch the latent-type definition so ell includes H_0, or replace pi_ell by pi_{h0,ell} and rewrite L_e and the LP constraints accordingly.

Add a related-work paragraph comparing the kernel to Michael-Cui-Lorch-Tchetgen Tchetgen 2024 and van den Berg-Bonev-Mammen 2020, emphasizing point-identification/estimation versus sharp finite LP bounds.

State Conjecture 1 with an explicit requirement that the Markov-compressed LP preserves the named stagewise compliance margins, since the abstract claims this but the formal containment statement only names A_sP.

recommended_next_step: Revise the setup to define H_0 inside the latent table and add the missed dynamic time-varying IV comparisons before advancing.
